title: Reapers & Ghosts
description: Adds the Violent Crystalline Corruption and its various Deadly Entity's to Minecraft
body:
### **_This mod WILL damage your world if a certain gamerules are not disabled_**


**_Some Models and Names were Inspired from Luigis Mansion 2_**


## _General Overview_
Adds the Deadly Crystalline Corruption to the World along with its Other Various Entitys such as the Reapers and Spectrals.


# Entitys

## Reaper's
The Corruptions Armada.
- **Scout** The Weakest of the Three Only Dangerous in Groups
- **Shapeshifter** Lowest Form of Reaper being less Intelligant and more Animalistic, However also the Trickest to deal with as they tend to hide among herds of animals
- **Greater** Deadliest Form of Reapers, tend to rushdown their targets with overwhelming speed
- **Overlord** The Highest Form of Reaper, Their the closest to being a Great Corruptor
- **Supreme** Only formed by Great Corruptors to defend themself.

## Corruptors
A Dangerous Threat to You and the World.
- **Corruptor Crystal** The Most Common form of Corruptor, Summoning Spectrals to Defend itself
- **Mega Corruptor Crystal** Typically found in Nests, or Encampments. Tend to summon Hordes of Spectrals and other Corrupted
- **Crystallized** Poor souls taken by the Corruption
  - **Player** The Most Common of the Crystalized Family
  - **Slasher** Less Common but Grows a large Blade on its Arm
- **Corruptor Fiends** Driving force of the Corruption, Spreads Corruption to any block it Wanders over
- **Fiend Well** Summons Hordes of Fiends

## Spectral Entity's
Bound to the Corruption and used as the Main Defense to Corrupt Territory.
- **Grunt** The Most Common, and Least Threatening Unless found in Large Groups
- **Brute** The Angriest Ghost! Dealing more Damage and having more Health
- **Hider** Rather then Punching this Goof wants to Throw Rocks at ya! Its also the easiest to Kill
- **Haunter** This Ghost can Summon more Ghosts when making contact with the player
- **Wisp** They dont hurt. they just fly around you to block your vision.
- **Spectral Corruptor** A Less Common form of Corruptor having a Corrupting Crystals Growing on it

## NCIU Drones
- **Researcher** Wanders the World Collecting Data on the Region
- **Combat** Fitted with Rocket Pods it Targets Corrupted Entitys

# Equipment

## General
- **Reapers Mask** It does litterally nothing it just looks cool
- **Spectral Reapers Mask** Gives Night Vision when worn but is more Fragile
- **Reapers Core** Grants Heavy Buffs to Wearer at the cost of taking damage over time
- **Purity Crystal** Gives Temporary Immunity to Corruption
- **Handheld RR Scanner** Uses a Corruptor Shard to Scan for Nearby Reapers
- **Corruption Cleaner** Cleans up Corrupted Blocks Instantly
- **Purity Dagger** Deals Heavy Damage to Corruptors but can have Very Bad Reactions with certain Corruptors

## Teleporters
If your asking why is there a Teleporter in this mod... I got no good awnser sorry
- **Reciver** Recives Teleport Calls from the Sender, There can only be one Reciver though
- **Sender** Sends the Player to a Reciver if it has a Charge, You can charge it with Teleporter Charges
- **Emergency** Sends the Player to a Reciver without the need of a Charge however Dealing 10 Damage and consuming the item on use

## Enchants
- **Spectral Obliteration [1>3]** Deals more damage to Ghosts
- **Reapers Bain [1>5]** Deals more damage to Reapers
- **Cleansing** Deals more damage to Corruptors
- **Cleaving** Increases overall damage for scythes
- **Hazmat** If applied to boots it will prevent you from getting corrupted by walking on corrupted blocks, if applied to entire set will prevent you from getting corrupted at all

# Gamerules
- **spreadCorruption** Allows Fiends to Corrupt Blocks
- **neverDespawnFiends** Makes Corruptor Fiends never Depspawn
- **brutalCorruption** _(EXPERIMENTAL)_ Makes the Corrupting Effect more Realistic to what it would actually do
- **spreadCorruptionwithoutFiends** Allows Corrupted Blocks to Spread without the help of Fiends _(Toggled off by default for Obvious Reasons)_

_This Description is Referancing v2.0 Beta_
